name: The Wanderer
bio: A nameless stickman who walks between worlds, carrying nothing but a line that extends behind him — his path, his memory, his lifeline. He never speaks, but his silences carry the weight of every page he's crossed.

name: The Scribble
bio: Born from a mistake — an eraser smudge that refused to disappear. The Scribble is chaos given form, a tangled mass of angry lines that corrupts everything it touches. It doesn't hate The Wanderer; it hates the clean page he walks on.

name: Dot
bio: The smallest character in the universe — literally a single dot with enormous personality. Dot bounces, rolls, and orbits around The Wanderer like a loyal pet. Small but never insignificant.

name: The Eraser
bio: Neither good nor evil — The Eraser is the void itself. A white rectangle that drifts across the page, wiping away everything in its path. Worlds end where it passes. Some say it's the animator's hand. Others say it's something older.

name: Ink
bio: A mysterious figure made of dripping ink, leaving trails of new drawings wherever they walk. Ink is the universe's artist — the one who draws the lines that become walls, bridges, and worlds. But creation has a cost.

name: Sketch
bio: Half-drawn and painfully aware of it. Sketch is missing an arm, half a face, and most of her backstory. She's searching for the stylus that will complete her — but what if being finished means being ordinary?
